general_info.definition: Carbon nanoparticles for the detection of dopamine based on the fluorescent enhancement

method.conditions: Hot alkali solution(sodium hydroxide) for 5 min

structural.crystallinity: lattice fringes with interplanar distance around 0.20nm. Disordered structure in crystalline of the sp2 cluster and the plane graphite sp3

applications.performance: Linear range 1.0-10.0 µM; Lower Detection limit 0.22 µM
applications.comparative_advantage: Fast response, is inexpensive and highly selective.)

feedback.label: Good
feedback.expert_comment: Applicability Verified: The extracted aplication domains align perfectly with those mentioned in the source text. The model accurately identified, listed and described all relevant application areas for the Carbon Dots used in the article. | High Scientific Context: Quantitative data was extracted with high precision. The model successfully preserved scientific context (e.g., relating Quantum Yield to its reference material) and handled value ranges/uncertainties as requested in the 'Data Quality' section. | Structural Integrity: The output matches the required JSON schema perfectly. Complex nested arrays (such as precursors/dopants and application domains) were populated correctly without truncating list items or breaking the syntax.
